NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR NOV-27-2023 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-05-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER JURY TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-27-2023 - KARTIKEY PRADHAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS PATRICIA VASQUEZ, RODOLFO REYES AND JOSE B. VAZQUEZ. NO APPEARANCE AT TRIAL CALL BY PLAINTIFF JOHNNY CHENG, SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT GRANTED COUNSEL'S REQUESTS TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND SET A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE (MSC). THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO APR-08-2024 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. COUNSEL TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED TRIAL DATE. COUNSEL REQUESTED TO SET THE MSC IN JANUARY 2024. COURT WILL SET THE MSC APPROXIMATELY THE 2ND-3RD WEEK OF JANUARY 2024 AND WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE MSC. THE COURT STATED THAT IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO APPEAR AT THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, THEN THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-08-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 503. NON-APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WILL RESULT IN THE DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF THIS CASE. (206)
